title: Spicy Pili Chicken
description: A flavorful and spicy dish made with marinated chicken, pili, and peri sauce.
instructions: In a blender, combine pili, peri sauce, toor, and garlic. Blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, mix together olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Add the blended mixture to the bowl and mix well.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve the chicken with kebab and with sauce on the side.
